title: Automate your workflow with GitHub Actions Part 2 of 2
summary: This is part two of a GitHub Action Learning Path. Learn how GitHub Actions enables you to automate your software development cycle.

lessons.title: Leverage GitHub Actions to publish to GitHub Packages
lessons.content_md:
Publish your code libraries or Docker images automatically and securely with GitHub Packages.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/github-actions-packages/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Automate your workflow with GitHub Actions Part 2 of 2
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Automate your workflow with GitHub Actions Part 2 of 2**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
